ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Please note that the corporate VPN will undergo routine maintenance on **Wednesday, 18th April**, from 02:00 AM to 04:30 AM IST. During this window the VPN will be unavailable. 

To ensure uninterrupted access to our internal resources:
1. Log out of all VPN sessions before 01:45 AM.
2. Reconnect after 04:45 AM.
3. If you encounter any connectivity issues post‑maintenance, report to the IT Helpdesk at <URL>.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Congratulations! Claim Your University Scholarship Now
spam.body:
Hello,

You have been selected for an exclusive scholarship by the prestigious Global University. This scholarship is worth **₹10,00,000** and is available only to a few deserving students. 

To verify your eligibility and claim the scholarship, we require the following:
1. Your student ID and recent transcript.
2. Proof of address.
3. A signed declaration of academic honesty.

Please submit the documents at <URL> within the next **48 hours**. Delay and you may lose the scholarship.

This offer is backed by the Vice‑Chancellor’s office. Use the link above to secure your future. If you do not comply, your application will be automatically cancelled.

Best wishes,
Dr. S. Kapoor
Head of Scholarship Office
